name: default_ascii_axis_vector_projection
notes: Terminal X increases to the right/east.
Terminal Y increases downward/south, so upward/north movement uses a negative Y component.
Positive Z appears southwest/down-left, approximately 7:30 on a clock.
Negative Z therefore appears northeast/up-right, approximately 1:30 on a clock.
These are projection vectors, not 3D rotation vectors.
